title: 'It Was Purely A Gimmick': Varun Dhawan's Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai Team Denies AI Use In Film Amid Row Over 'AI Babies' In Teaser
description: The AI-driven concept triggered speculation online, with many wondering whether Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai itself relies heavily on artificial intelligence. Addressing these concerns, a source close to the production clarified that the use of AI was limited to the teaser
content: The makers of Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai have responded to online chatter surrounding the film’s first look, which sparked debate over the use of artificial intelligence. Headlined by Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur and Pooja Hegde, and directed by Dav... [1793 chars]

title: Word of the Week: Slopaganda - the AI-generated visuals of Trump and Iran flooding the internet
description: As the war between Iran and the US continues, it’s hard not to have come across the many videos on social media poking fun at the US president. What about Donald Trump’s now-deleted image of him in a Jesus-like avatar? All of this is slopaganda — propaganda material which is created with the use of artificial intelligence
content:
The Iran war has seen the deployment of missiles, drones, and other weaponry.
But this war has also seen the internet flooded with AI videos and images, racking up millions of views and drawing a lively response from audiences around the world. Every... [4511 chars]

title: JU, NIELIT conduct interactive session on AI skill training
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Apr 18: The Centre for Distance and Online Education (CDOE), University of Jammu, in collaboration with the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT), Jammu, organized an interactive session on Artificial Intelligence (AI) skill training for its students today. Two skill-based training programmes-Fundamentals of Data Annotation Using Python and Fundamentals of Data Curation Using Python-are currently being conducted for the students of CDOE by officers from NIELIT, Jammu, under a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) signed between […]
